name: Air / Solo Glass Aroma Tube
summary: This Arizer Air Glass Aroma Tube is compatible with several models including Solo 3, Solo 2 Max, Air Max, Air SE, or Solo 2.
description: This Arizer Air Glass Aroma Tube is compatible with several models including Solo 3, Solo 2 Max, Air Max, Air SE, or Solo 2. Standing at 110mm tall, it is an official product from Arizer and can be used with all Air, Solo 1, 2, 3, and Air vaporisers. ** Please note: Not compatible with the ARGO vape. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
